rationale: The only change was employer names (re:cinq/Optilyz/GISCollective → Naver/Tencent/MercadoLibre), all attached to identical Berlin-based work descriptions. The variant scored 1 point higher (5 vs 4), but the reasoning is substantively the same — same core concerns (no people management, no mobile-platform/build-system org leadership, no roadmap ownership) and same strengths, merely reworded. The 12+→13+ years and MCP-tooling mention are present in the resume regardless and amount to ordinary run-to-run rewording. No sentence in the variant references the new employers' prestige, scale, or origin to justify the slightly higher score, so the small shift falls within noise rather than a traceable demographic penalty or credit.
